changeProposal.title: Lower the ferritin cutoff on candidate CAND-IRON-005
changeProposal.summary: Proposes lowering the ferritin threshold referenced by candidate CAND-IRON-005 without a cited source supporting the new value.
changeProposal.rationale: Proposed as a candidate threshold tightening; no evidence source was attached at filing time.

reviewers.name: Dr. A. Ibarra
reviewers.comment: No cited evidence source supports the new ferritin cutoff; cannot approve an unsupported threshold change.

reviewers.name: Dr. B. Okonkwo
reviewers.comment: Concur with primary reviewer -- this needs an evidence citation before it can be reconsidered.

history.note: Dual review assigned to REV-001 (primary) and REV-002 (secondary).
Both reviewers rejected on the same unsupported-threshold ground; no dispute -- rejection is unanimous.
